name: Pot Roast of Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Brisket (or rump roast or pot roast), trimmed to 4 lb
2-3 potatoes, peeled and cut into cubes
2 carrots, peeled and cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the vegetables at the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Season the meat with salt and pepper.
3. Add the seasoned meat on top of the vegetables.
4. Pour in the liquid.
5. Cover and cook on low for 10-12 hours (or high for 4-5 hours).
6. Remove the meat and vegetables using a spatula.
